message:
fix(doctor): add fix for stale JSONL in dolt-native mode (bd-bbo8)

In dolt-native mode, Dolt is the source of truth. When doctor detects
JSONL differs from git HEAD, it now suggests `git restore` instead of
`git add && commit` since JSONL modifications are erroneous.

- checkJSONLGitDivergence: suggest git restore for dolt-native
- checkUncommittedBeadsChanges: same fix for uncommitted .beads/
- Add SyncDivergence fix function that restores JSONL from git HEAD
- Add test for dolt-native mode behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 		"Schema Compatibility",
 		"JSONL Integrity",

+		"Sync Divergence",
 	}
 	priority := make(map[string]int, len(order))
 	for i, name := range order {
@@ -235,6 +236,8 @@ func applyFixList(path string, fixes []doctorCheck) {
 			err = fix.Daemon(path)
 		case "DB-JSONL Sync":
 			err = fix.DBJSONLSync(path)
+		case "Sync Divergence":
+			err = fix.SyncDivergence(path)
 		case "Permissions":
